meta.title: DEF CON 33 - BiC Village - Breaking Down Bias in the Cyber Stack - Kaleeque Pierce, Jess Hoffman
meta.description: Bias shows up in security controls, hiring pipelines, and more. Learn how to detect and disrupt it across your organization’s cyber stack.
